description: Escalation protocol defining graduated defense responses. Each level transitions through shape anchors — from observation (SHAPE.OCTA) through containment (SHAPE.CUBE) to activation (SHAPE.TETRA).

escalation_levels.name: flag
escalation_levels.action: Mark pattern for review. Alert upstream.

escalation_levels.name: isolate
escalation_levels.action: Full isolation. Activation energy barrier raised.

de_escalation.description: Reversible levels can de-escalate when threat signal drops below threshold for sustained period.
de_escalation.constraint: Irreversible levels (4-5) cannot de-escalate. Second law — entropy of confirmed breach cannot decrease.
